title: Important Dates for TNGASA UG Admission 2026

detail.title: Important Dates for TNGASA UG Admission 2026
detail.short_info: TNGASA UG Admission 2026 has started. Online application opened on 7 May 2026 and the last date to apply is 29 May 2026. Check eligibility, application fee, important dates and direct link to apply for Tamil Nadu Government Arts and Science Colleges UG Admission 2026.

content.text: TNGASA UG Admission 2026 has officially started. The Directorate of Collegiate Education, Tamil Nadu, has opened the online registration process for admission to various undergraduate courses in 181 Government Arts and Science Colleges across the state. Online applications commenced on 7 May 2026, and the last date to submit the TNGASA UG application form is 29 May 2026.
This is a golden opportunity for students looking for quality higher education in government institutions at affordable fees.
[Apply Online for TNGASA UG 2026] – Direct link

rows: Tamil Nadu Government Arts and Science Colleges Admission (TNGASA) UG 2026
BA, B.Sc, B.Com, BCA, BBA and other UG courses

sections.heading: Important Dates for TNGASA UG Admission 2026

rows: Last Date for Submitting Online Application
Release of Rank List (Special & General Category)
Counselling for Special Quota & General Category

content.text: Candidates should regularly check the official website for updates on rank list and counselling schedule.

rows: Must have passed Higher Secondary (Class 12) or equivalent examination
As per course and category requirements
Upper age limit is 21 years as on 01 July 2026 (relaxation applicable)
Tamil Nadu domicile preferred; open to others as per rules

content.text: Note: Relaxation in age and marks is provided for SC/SCA/ST, BC, MBC, DNC, and Differently Abled candidates as per Government norms.
Fee is payable online. No refund will be issued after payment.

sections.heading: How to Apply for TNGASA UG Admission 2026

items: Fill Personal, Academic, and Special Category details
Preview, submit, and download the application form

sections.heading: TNGASA UG Counselling and Seat Allotment 2026

content.text: Admission is purely merit-based on Class 12 marks. After application, rank lists will be published. Eligible candidates will exercise web options for college and course preferences. Seat allotment will be done based on merit, reservation, and choices filled. Candidates must report to the allotted college with original documents for confirmation.
